name: clawcast-studio
description: Claworld branded Mac recording cockpit for AI creator videos, with a visible profile card and protected teleprompter.
author: David

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/control.js && node --check src/renderer/overlay.js && node --check src/renderer/prompter.js && node --check src/renderer/region.js
